description: Use this API to add a polynomial and exponential cost curve table record to the working case. It may also be used to modify an existing polynomial and exponential cost curve table record. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_csttbl_poly(tbl, labl, cost, lincst, quacst, expcst, expon)
python_syntax: ierr = opf_csttbl_poly(tbl, labl, cost, lincst, quacst, expcst, expon)

parameters.name: tbl
parameters.description: Polynomial and exponential cost curve table number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: labl
parameters.description: Cost table description of, at most, 12 characters. (input; ‘ ‘ by default).

parameters.name: lincst
parameters.description: Linear cost coefficient value. (input; 1.0 by default).

parameters.name: quacst
parameters.description: Quadratic cost coefficient value. (input; 1.0 by default).

parameters.name: expcst
parameters.description: Exponential cost coefficient value. (input; 0.0 by default).

parameters.name: expon
parameters.description: Exponent of the exponential cost coefficient. (input; 0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: exceeded maximum number of allowable cost curve data values.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
